notes: Phase 1 / Tier 14 list (Mogu'shan Vaults, Heart of Fear, Terrace of Endless Spring — Heroic versions). Tier token bosses: helm = Sha of Fear, shoulders = Lei Shi, chest = Grand Empress Shek'zeer, hands = Wind Lord Mel'jarak, legs = Amber-Shaper Un'sok. Four-piece White Tiger (protection pieces) with Kilrak and Qiang's shield; Seal of the Bloodseeker comes from the Klaxxi quest Shadow of the Empire. Draft compiled from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Protection Paladin gear guide (Phase 1 table).
